name: Krispy Kreme, Inc.
summary: PART I The Joy of Krispy Kreme Krispy Kreme, Inc. (KKI and, together with its subsidiaries, the Company or Krispy Kreme) is one of the most beloved and well-known sweet treat brands in the world. Over its nearly 89-year history, Krispy Kreme has developed a broad consumer base globally and currently operates in 42 countries through its unique network of shops (Doughnut Shops), partnerships with leading retailers, and growing digital business.
